fields.name: File Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the picture file. It must be the same as the item number.

fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item that the picture is for.

fields.name: Item Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the item that the picture is for.

fields.name: Import Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the last import of the picture was been skipped, is pending, or is completed.

fields.name: Picture Already Exists
fields.tooltip: Specifies if a picture already exists for the item card.

fields.name: File Size (KB)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the size of the picture file.

fields.name: File Extension
fields.tooltip: Specifies the format of the picture file.

fields.name: Modified Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies when the picture was last modified.
